title: FAI Aviation Group (fai.ag) - The biggest leak ever ransomware incident

victim.name: FAI Aviation Group (fai.ag) - The biggest leak ever

extortion.description: [AI generated] FAI Aviation Group is a global aviation service provider based in Germany. The company offers services including aircraft charter, aircraft management, air ambulance services, and special mission services. It owns a fleet of jets and helicopters, making it one of the largest aircraft operators in Europe. The term "The biggest leak ever" does not directly relate to the company's core operations.
